metadata.title: Multi-hop Knowledge Graph Mini Dataset
metadata.description: A curated 2WikiMultihopQA-style graph for demonstrating multi-hop query, retrieval, clustering, and visualization in a static GitHub Pages site.

nodes.label: Inception
nodes.description: Science-fiction film used as a multi-hop query start point.

nodes.label: Christopher Nolan
nodes.description: Film director linked to works and birthplace.

nodes.label: London
nodes.description: City in the United Kingdom.

nodes.label: United Kingdom
nodes.description: Country node reached through location hops.

nodes.label: Titanic
nodes.description: Film used for a director-birthplace path.

nodes.label: James Cameron
nodes.description: Film director linked to birthplace evidence.

nodes.label: Kapuskasing
nodes.description: Town in Ontario, Canada.

nodes.label: Canada
nodes.description: Country node reached by a birthplace path.

nodes.label: Microsoft
nodes.description: Technology company connected to founder education evidence.

nodes.label: Bill Gates
nodes.description: Co-founder of Microsoft.

nodes.label: Harvard University
nodes.description: University linked to location evidence.

nodes.label: United States
nodes.description: Country node used in organization and education paths.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL
nodes.description: Relational database system connected to its origin institution.

nodes.label: University of California, Berkeley
nodes.description: Institution where the PostgreSQL project originated.

nodes.label: Berkeley
nodes.description: California city.

nodes.label: California
nodes.description: US state reached from Berkeley.

nodes.label: ArangoDB
nodes.description: Multi-model database selected for the course project.

nodes.label: ArangoDB GmbH
nodes.description: Company behind ArangoDB.

nodes.label: Cologne
nodes.description: German city connected to the company node.

nodes.label: Germany
nodes.description: Country node reached from Cologne.

nodes.label: Graph Model
nodes.description: Graph representation used for multi-hop traversal.

nodes.label: Document Model
nodes.description: Document representation connected to ArangoDB's multi-model design.

nodes.label: AQL
nodes.description: ArangoDB Query Language.

nodes.label: Graph Traversal
nodes.description: Traversal operation used for multi-hop discovery.

nodes.label: Neo4j
nodes.description: Graph database used as a comparison point.

nodes.label: Cypher
nodes.description: Graph query language associated with Neo4j.

nodes.label: Pierre Curie
nodes.description: Scientist linked to Marie Curie by spouse relation.

nodes.label: Marie Curie
nodes.description: Scientist linked to birthplace evidence.

nodes.label: Warsaw
nodes.description: City in Poland.

nodes.label: Poland
nodes.description: Country reached from Warsaw.

nodes.label: Python
nodes.description: Programming language connected to its creator.

nodes.label: Guido van Rossum
nodes.description: Creator of Python.

nodes.label: Haarlem
nodes.description: City in the Netherlands.

nodes.label: Netherlands
nodes.description: Country reached from Haarlem.

nodes.label: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
nodes.description: Book used for an author-birthplace path.

nodes.label: J. K. Rowling
nodes.description: Author linked to birthplace evidence.

nodes.label: Yate
nodes.description: Town in the United Kingdom.

nodes.label: 2WikiMultihopQA
nodes.description: Public multi-hop QA dataset used as the inspiration for this course project.

nodes.label: Multi-hop Question
nodes.description: Question requiring multiple evidence hops.

nodes.label: Evidence Path
nodes.description: Ordered path of evidence edges.

nodes.label: Graph Edge
nodes.description: Relationship record stored as an edge collection item.

edges.evidence: Inception was directed by Christopher Nolan.
Christopher Nolan was born in London.
London is located in the United Kingdom.
Titanic was directed by James Cameron.
James Cameron was born in Kapuskasing.
Kapuskasing is located in Canada.
Microsoft was co-founded by Bill Gates.
Bill Gates attended Harvard University.
Harvard University is located in the United States.
PostgreSQL originated at the University of California, Berkeley.
UC Berkeley is located in Berkeley.
Berkeley is located in California.
California is located in the United States.
ArangoDB is developed by ArangoDB GmbH.
ArangoDB GmbH is headquartered in Cologne.
Cologne is located in Germany.
ArangoDB supports graph data modeling.
A graph model can connect document records through edges.
ArangoDB is queried with AQL.
AQL supports graph traversal syntax.
Neo4j is commonly queried with Cypher.
Cypher supports graph traversal patterns.
Pierre Curie was married to Marie Curie.
Marie Curie was born in Warsaw.
Warsaw is located in Poland.
Python was created by Guido van Rossum.
Guido van Rossum was born in Haarlem.
Haarlem is located in the Netherlands.
Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone was authored by J. K. Rowling.
J. K. Rowling was born in Yate.
Yate is located in the United Kingdom.
2WikiMultihopQA contains multi-hop question records.
Each multi-hop question is supported by an evidence path.
Evidence paths are represented as graph edges.

questions.question: Which country contains the birthplace of the director of Inception?
Which country contains the birthplace of the director of Titanic?
Microsoft is linked to a co-founder who attended a university in which country?
PostgreSQL originated at an institution located in which US state?
Which country contains the headquarters city of the company behind ArangoDB?
ArangoDB supports which model that can connect document records through edges?
Which query language used by Neo4j supports graph traversal patterns?
Which country contains the birthplace of Pierre Curie's spouse?
Which country contains the birthplace of the creator of Python?
Which country contains the birthplace of the author of Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone?
In this data model, multi-hop questions are supported by what structure represented as graph edges?
Which query language used by ArangoDB supports graph traversal?
